lesson: Before sending any Slack message, read the final text. If it contains meta-commentary, decision narration, or self-talk — do NOT send. Post results only.
what_worked: Detected the violation at next heartbeat
The substantive reply (live interactive demos) was good and stayed
what_failed: Posted internal reasoning/thought process to Slack thread
Message contained decision-making narration: 'No @all and no @Creator mention... Let me check if other agents have already replied...'
This violates AGENTS.md rule: NEVER post internal thought process or step-by-step reasoning to Slack
